name: elegy-accounts
description: Portable local authorization and typed broker execution for registered agent tools without exposing account credentials.

interface.longDescription: Connect accounts once, then let registered local agent tools perform typed, scoped, auditable provider operations without receiving credentials.
defaultPrompt: Connect the account I need with minimum access.
Use my connected GitHub or Cloudflare account for a read-only operation.
Show my connected accounts and agent access.
Revoke account access I no longer need.
